title: No full runway shutdown at Srinagar airport this year: airport authorities
content: The airport added that the previously proposed NOTAM regarding full runway closure on Mondays and Tuesdays has been withdrawn

title: NHRC seeks action from RPF chief on harassment of rights activist
content: Guwahati-based Monojit Singha says he was victimised after he exposed an illegal railway quarter-rent racket

title: PM Modi inaugurates new Jodhpur airport terminal, launches Modified UDAN scheme
content: PM Modi arrived in Jodhpur and was received at the airport by Governor Haribhau Bagade, Union Minister and Jodhpur MP Gajendra Singh Shekhawat, and Chief Minister Bhajanlal Sharma

title: Assam district orders deportation of man declared foreigner
content: Adjudged a non-citizen by a Foreigners’ Tribunal, Kayam Ansari has been asked to exit India under the provisions of the Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act, 1950

title: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta orders rollback of work from home, staggered office timings
content: With the geopolitical situation normalising, Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta has approved the withdrawal of work from home on Wednesday and Saturday

title: Day 15 of CJP protest: Fasting Wangchuk's health worsens; 'Why Pradhan not sacked yet,' Dipke asks
content: In another post, Mr. Dipke said the government would be responsible if anything happened to the activist

title: AMMA crisis: Women actors accuse Shwetha Menon of communal polarisation, political and corporate nexus
content: Actors Ansiba Hassan, Maala Parvathy, and Usha Haseena address the media hours after Shwetha Menon secured a stay from a munsif court against functioning of AMMA ad-hoc committee that followed her resignation announcement

title: From Aldur to orbit: The remarkable journey of Chikkamagaluru boy-turned-Pixxel CEO
content: Hailing from Aldur in Chikkamagaluru, Awais Ahmed is among the leading young entrepreneurs in India’s private space sector

title: Battery apps taken down in India after stalled e-rickshaw rides
content: Over the last few days, videos of people using Chinese battery management apps to remotely cut power to e-rickshaws mid-ride have gone viral

title: AI hiring outpaces overall IT recruitment in India, report shows
content: The sector’s AI hiring rose 16% year-on-year in June, while overall IT jobs ‌declined 3%, according to job portal Naukri’s monthly JobSpeak report

title: Absenteeism crackdown sparks calls for systemic reforms in T.N. public health sector
content: Government doctors say pay disparities, manpower shortage, extended duty hours, and workplace safety are some of the issues that need to be addressed. They also accuse successive governments of finding it politically convenient to position doctors against the public

title: Kerala rains: Water from Idukki Pambla dam released; residents along Periyar advised caution
content: Idukki district administration permits opening of dam shutters as precautionary measure following heavy rainfall in catchment areas. Pambla dam is operated by Kerala State Electricity Board for power generation

title: The rise of Mahjong in Visakhapatnam
content: Once confined to niche circles, Mahjong, the centuries-old tile game is drawing a growing community of players in Visakhapatnam

title: Bandra is disappearing: Is this what Mumbai calls development?
content: The suburb is changing fast. With redevelopment, Mumbai will likely metamorphose into a city of identical towers instead of distinct neighbourhoods

title: MHA designates 23 Pakistan-based individuals as ‘terrorists’ under UAPA
content: Including the names of terrorists in the list will allow the NIA to block their finances, impose embargo on arms sales, and seize their assets

title: Full list of individuals designated as ‘terrorist’ under the UAPA
content: JeM commander Ashiq Ahmed Nengroo is the latest to be added to a list of 36 individuals declared terrorists under UAPA.

title: Storage precarious across Karnataka reservoirs; hopes pinned on rains in July, August
content: The cumulative storage across major reservoirs in Karnataka is hardly 21% of their installed capacity

title: Bleak scenario: Karnataka’s hydel storage second-lowest in last 10 years
content: The cumulative storage in all the three hydel reservoirs account for a mere 14.9% of the full capacity on July 3, 2026, as against 44.05% during corresponding period last year

title: Heavy rain continues in Mumbai, Thane; red alert remains for July 4-6
content: The RMD, Mumbai, has issued a Red Alert for July 4 for Mumbai, Thane, Palghar, Raigad, Ratnagiri, and Sindhudurg districts. For July 5 and 6, the Red Alert continues for these coastal districts

title: How El Niño could damage India’s economy | Explained
content: A poor monsoon can damage the economy in three ways: it affects agricultural output, reducing the sector’s contribution to the economy; it hits rural income, denting aggregate demand; and it threatens to push up food prices, causing inflation.

title: No need for India to take a leaf out of Pakistan’s Iran mediation book, says envoy
content: Mediating in an “already crowded” field on the Iran crisis would not have benefited India, said Ambassador to China Vikram Doraiswami

title: ‘Nedumkandam Miracle’: Mohanlal to star in Dileesh Pothan’s next directorial
content: The film will be penned by Syam Pushkaran and Paulson Skaria, with Shyju Khalid handling the cinematography

title: Centre asks States to complete fire safety audits of all hospitals by July 31
content: In a letter to States and UTs, Union Health Secretary Punya Salila Srivastava said fire safety should become an integral part of routine hospital management and patient safety protocols

title: Mapping cancer, testing capacity
content: Telangana government’s decision to make cancer a notifiable disease promises to reveal its true burden in the State. But unless treatment infrastructure expands beyond Hyderabad, identifying more patients may only expose a healthcare system already stretched to its limits, writes Siddharth Kumar Singh

title: India investigating Tata data leak that exposed Apple iPhone secrets
content: Tata ⁠has hired a global consultant to conduct ⁠a forensic audit after the leak also saw Tesla, Qualcomm and TSMC ‌documents posted on the dark web

title: After Ayodhya, Badrinath Dham hit by donation theft claims; inquiry ordered
content: BKTC president Hemant Dwivedi said that if the allegations are proven true during the investigation, no guilty party will be spared, and strict action will be taken

title: Firing at Pune businessman's office: Suspected Bishnoi gang member apprehended from Rajasthan
content: The crime branch apprehended the suspect, Pawan Ram, from Hanumangarh district in Rajasthan on Friday (July 3, 2026), an official said

title: High Court quashes externment order, comments on 'horse trading' in Maharashtra
content: The Bombay High Court Judge Justice Madhav Jamdar also made additional oral remarks on the tendency to curb protests, stating that citizens were being treated as slaves of the Government

title: Hyderabad’s work-site schools bring education and safety to children of migrant workers
content: As migrant workers build Hyderabad’s skyline, a classroom inside a Narsingi labour camp is ensuring their children are not left unattended or left out of school, with two more such schools set to open soon.

title: SIR: Strapped for time, BLOs skip door-to-door visits; distribute enumeration forms at community halls
content: Enumeration forms were delivered to the Booth Level Officers three to four days ago, shortening the window for their onward distribution

title: When Hyderabad loved and lost the beautiful game
content: In a different era, Hyderabad was a powerhouse of football with players like Peter Thangaraj, Tulsidas Balaram, Syed Abdul Rahim, Victor Amalraj and a host of other kicking ball and making their mark. The peak of that success story was in the 1950s

title: Officials not obliged to attend ‘review’ meetings with Governor, says T.N. Law Minister
content: His remarks followed reports that Tamil Nadu Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar had wanted to hold a ‘review’ meeting with officials at the Madurai Circuit House

title: The station that trains pass by: R.K. Nagar’s long wait for a stop
content: South Central Railway (SCR) had announced that six express trains would halt at the station, however an inspection before the launch of services the officials found that the new station could accommodate only 18 coaches while most express trains operate with 22 or 24 coaches

title: BJP spokesperson condemns Minister’s comments on Governor
content: The Governor, as a Constitutional authority, has every right to draw attention to pressing civic and environmental problems affecting the people, says Narayanan Thirupathy

title: Ketan Agarwal murder case: Court rejects police custody plea, sends accused to judicial remand
content: The investigating agency had sought two days of police custody, informing the court that verification of certain investigation aspects and scientific procedures remained pending

title: Trinamool infighting escalates as Ritabrata-led camp ‘takes control’ over party headquarters
content: The development comes a day after Ritabrata Banerjee and other MLAs belonging to his camp met the full bench of Election Commission in Delhi and staked claim for the party

title: Bengaluru crèche horror: Parents say kid has loo phobia after assault; nanny arrested
content: Parents report disturbing behavioral changes in toddlers after alleged abuse at a Capgemini campus daycare. A two-and-a-half-year-old girl developed an intense fear of bathrooms, allegedly due to being locked inside. While some caretakers are arrested, investigations continue into harsh treatment and low salaries. The Home Minister criticized Capgemini's oversight, impacting Bengaluru's image.

title: Tiny coffin beside Khamenei's: 14-month-old granddaughter honoured at funeral
content: Iran mourned its late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei with funeral ceremonies in Tehran, where his coffin was displayed alongside that of his 14-month-old granddaughter, killed in an Israeli airstrike.  The event also honored other family members, including his son-in-law and daughter.  Thousands gathered for prayers, with traditional practices observed.  The funeral procession is expected to span several days and locations, including neighboring Iraq.

title: Cabo Verde give Messi ultimate scare as they sign off in style
content: Day 23 saw the Blue Sharks almost stunning Messi and Co, King Salah reach the Round of 16 and Colombia win the Powder Derby. Read more in today's Offside.

title: Egypt head coach raises Palestinian flag after historic FIFA World Cup win
content: Egypt's historic FIFA World Cup Round of 32 victory over Australia was marked by an emotional tribute from coach Hossam Hassan, who raised the Palestinian flag and dedicated the win to both nations.  The Pharaohs secured their first-ever knockout stage advancement via a dramatic penalty shootout after a 1-1 draw. They now face Argentina or Cape Verde in the Round of 16.

title: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas on why American dream is not over
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas says the American dream is far from dead. On "The Joe Rogan Experience," the Indian-origin founder called the US the only country where a risky idea gets taken seriously instead of dismissed. Raised lower-middle-class in India, Srinivas credits America's risk-seeking culture for keeping it on top—arguing newcomers can still build companies that challenge even the biggest tech giants.

title: Accidental PAC carbine firing triggers panic at UP's Kashi Vishwanath Dham
content: A stray carbine discharge at Kashi Vishwanath Dham's Nanu Feria Gate injured three florists on Saturday. The weapon accidentally fell, and two bullets hitting the road sent concrete fragments flying. The injured, Nikky Gupta, Ram Babu, and Vikas Yadav, received first aid and were discharged. The incident caused brief panic but was quickly controlled, with investigations underway.

title: Can landlords enter your rented home without notice? Here's what the law says
content: According to the Model Tenancy Act of 2021, landlords must provide at least 24 hours notice in writing before entering rented properties. This notice must detail the specific reason and time of entry and can only occur between sunrise and sunset. While this policy is designed for non-emergency situations such as repairs and inspections, urgent cases like fires are exceptions.

title: Maharashtra deputy CM Eknath Shinde hospitalised due to fever & exhaustion
content: Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde was hospitalized Friday in Thane due to viral fever and exhaustion following a demanding political schedule. His condition is stable, with doctors attributing his illness to intense work and travel, including recent political maneuvers. The incident led to the postponement of a party event, which was later held with his son representing him.

title: Days after Meta Layoffs, Zuckerberg says companies should empower workers, not replace them
content: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg believes AI-driven job losses are exaggerated, advocating for tools that boost individual productivity. This comes as the tech giant laid off 8,000 employees, reassigning another 7,000 to AI projects, while scrapping thousands of open roles.  The company is heavily investing in AI infrastructure, aiming for efficiency amidst a competitive landscape.  This stance contrasts with other industry leaders' more cautious outlooks on AI's impact on employment.

title: Make biotin gummies at home for hair growth: Easy recipe, benefits and science
content: Seeking thicker, stronger hair? Biotin gummies are popular, but store-bought versions often contain unwanted additives. Discover how to create your own simple, cleaner biotin gummies at home using just a supplement and a few kitchen staples. While biotin aids keratin production, research suggests supplements are most beneficial for those with deficiencies. Learn about the nutritional advantages of homemade options and other key nutrients for vibrant hair.

title: As Germany seeks to shed 'Sick Man of Europe' lable; changes Sick Leave policy
content: Germany is implementing significant reforms to boost its struggling economy, including a major overhaul of sick leave policies. Starting next year, workers will need a doctor's note from the first day of illness, ending the practice of phone-based sick leave. This move aims to combat high absence rates and improve productivity, though it faces strong opposition from unions and medical professionals concerned about worker rights and bureaucratic burdens.

title: 'Rain only good for those in balconies': Every monsoon, same old story in Mumbai
content: Mumbai's annual monsoon test has begun with the season's first heavy downpour, exposing civic unpreparedness. Tragic incidents, including a boy's death from a fallen tree and a man drowning in an open manhole, have marred the arrival of the rains. Commuters faced disruptions, with social media buzzing about flooded roads and delayed trains, highlighting the city's ongoing struggle with its monsoon challenges.

title: 'I want you to...': Ronaldo reaches out to Venezuelan boy who lost everything in earthquake
content: In a touching display of compassion, football legend Cristiano Ronaldo has become a source of inspiration for a young Venezuelan boy named Andrés, who tragically lost everything to recent earthquakes. Beyond a simple message of encouragement, Ronaldo has graciously invited Andrés to one of his many upcoming matches, reigniting hope in the hearts of those affected by this global disaster surrounding the World Cup.

title: 'Kabhi kabhi late na ho jaye': Kapil Dev cites Sachin amid Sooryavanshi debut debate
content: Former captain Kapil Dev weighed in on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's delayed India debut, urging selectors to pick him based on ability, not age.  Comparing him to a young Sachin Tendulkar, Dev cautioned against excessive hype while acknowledging the 15-year-old's immense T20 talent. He stressed that Sooryavanshi's true test will be overcoming inevitable tough phases in his career.

title: 'Blood pressure and sugar level falling': Wangchuk's health update on Day 7 of hunger strike
content: Sonam Wangchuk, on his seventh day of hunger strike demanding Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation, has lost over 5 kilograms, with his blood pressure and sugar levels dropping. Abhijeet Dipke of Cockroach Janata Party urged the government to act and encouraged public support at Jantar Mantar. The protest, initiated over NEET irregularities, has garnered support from various political and civil society figures.

title: 'The press would go wild': Trump suggests inviting Obama, Biden to football watch party
content: Donald Trump playfully suggested a reunion of former US presidents at the White House to watch a football game, a remark made during a children's book reading on a podcast. Despite past political clashes, Trump expressed admiration for Bill Clinton and shared lighthearted anecdotes about other presidents, including Taft and Kennedy. The podcast episode, featuring Trump reading a book about presidential leisure, sparked varied reactions online.

title: Watch: Thousands forced to evacuate as wildfire rages across Colorado
content: Wild winds fueled a fast-moving wildfire southwest of Denver, forcing thousands to evacuate and destroying over 160 structures. The Aspen Acres fire, now spanning 115 square miles, remains uncontained, with firefighters battling the blaze.  Meanwhile, other large fires rage across the western US, exacerbated by dry conditions.  Tragically, three helitack crew members lost their lives fighting the Snyder Fire in Colorado.

title: 'Planning wedding for 4 months': Siya Goyal's fiancé Ketan's old video resurfaces
content: A resurfaced video of Pune realtor Ketan Agarwal, speaking at his engagement celebration, has emerged as police investigate his death as a meticulously planned murder. Authorities allege his fiancée, Siya Goyal, and her alleged lover, Chetan Chaudhary, conspired to kill him, even rehearsing the act at the site where he later died. The couple has been sent to judicial custody after refusing polygraph tests.

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding: NFL, NBA, NHL, MLB stars who attended the event
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have tied the knot in a star-studded black-tie wedding at Madison Square Garden. The event saw a massive turnout from the NFL, including Patrick Mahomes and Jason Kelce, alongside sports figures from basketball, golf, and hockey. Family members played key roles, with the venue transformed for the private, two-day celebration.

title: Centre designates 23 Pak-based operatives linked to JeM, LeT as terrorists - full list
content: India has officially declared 23 Pakistan-based individuals as terrorists under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act. These individuals are linked to notorious terror outfits like Jaish-e-Mohammed and Lashkar-e-Taiba. The move empowers authorities to take stringent action against their terror networks and assets. Notably, Masood Ilyas Kashmiri, a senior JeM operative, was identified for his role in recruiting, training, and facilitating terror attacks, including the Sunjwan incident.

title: 'How has Sooryavanshi not played?': Ex-England captain baffled by India's decision
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's international debut remains elusive, sparking debate among cricket legends like Michael Vaughan and Sunil Gavaskar. Despite immense hype and stellar performances in U-19 World Cup and IPL, the young sensation has been benched for recent T20Is. Selectors cite 'appropriate time,' but fans and former players are questioning the delay, eager to witness the prodigy's talent on the global stage.

title: ‘Honoured to welcome my friend’: Australian PM ahead of PM Modi’s visit next week
content: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese eagerly anticipates Prime Minister Narendra Modi's state visit to Melbourne from July 8-10. This meeting, part of Modi's three-nation tour, aims to bolster the Comprehensive Strategic Partnership between India and Australia. Discussions will focus on deepening cooperation in trade, defense, security, and technology, reinforcing the Indo-Pacific's peace and prosperity. Albanese expressed honor in welcoming his "friend" Modi, highlighting the relationship's growing significance.

title: India clears air defence systems: How MR-SAM, V-SHORADS and Akash Tarang will secure the skies
content: India is bolstering its air defence with the Defence Acquisition Council's approval for new weapon systems. The Medium Range Surface-to-Air Missile (MR-SAM), Very Short Range Air Defence System (V-SHORADS), and Akash Tarang Anti-UAV Electronic Warfare System will enhance protection against drones, missiles, and aircraft. These acquisitions are crucial for the upcoming nationwide integrated air defence network, Sudarshan Chakra, building on lessons learned during Operation Sindoor.

title: How digital land records are helping tackle property fraud in India - explained
content: India's approach to land record management is being transformed with a major shift towards digitalization, focusing on improved transparency and fraud prevention. The Digital India Land Records Modernisation Program provides users with instant access to ownership information, maps, and property details. By introducing unique identifiers like Bhu-Aadhar and digitized maps, this project plays a vital role in simplifying real estate transactions and curtailing conflicts across the country.

title: Uttarakhand actor-businessman in China to send family home after 'racist trolling'
content: An Indian entrepreneur in China, Dev Raturi, is sending his wife and sons back to India due to a surge in AI-generated racist videos and online attacks targeting him and the Indian community. Raturi, who has lived in Xi'an for 21 years and built a successful business, stated he is not afraid but wants to protect his family.

title: India allows four Chinese firms into critical power tenders; Congress attacks move
content: India has permitted four Chinese power equipment manufacturers with local production to bid on critical government power projects for two years. This relaxation, aimed at accelerating power network expansion and renewable energy integration, follows a power ministry request. The move, however, has drawn sharp criticism from the Congress, citing ongoing border disputes and trade deficits with China.

title: 'Remember the name Cape Verde': Ashwin lauds FIFA World Cup debutants
content: Cricket legend Ravichandran Ashwin lauded FIFA World Cup debutants Cabo Verde for their inspiring campaign. Despite a narrow 3-2 extra-time loss to Argentina, the African nation captivated audiences with their fearless play, securing draws against Spain, Saudi Arabia, and Uruguay. Their remarkable journey, marked by tenacious comebacks against the reigning champions, has significantly enhanced their global reputation.

title: Bengaluru road rage: Man gets out of car, slaps biker in Indiranagar
content: A shocking video from Bengaluru's Indiranagar shows a luxury car passenger violently assaulting a biker at a red light. The incident, captured by a bystander, escalated from a traffic dispute when the passenger emerged from the luxury car to slap and shove the rider. The clip has ignited public anger and calls for police action, highlighting the growing concern over road rage in the city.

title: 'This is India's moment': Why the nation of 1.4 billion now has a dedicated pathway to EWC
content: India has secured a permanent qualification pathway to the Esports World Cup through the India Rising initiative, a collaboration between JioBLAST, Chess.com and the EWC Foundation. Leveraging the country's chess dominance and massive gaming market, the initiative aims to create a long-term pipeline for Indian talent. On Saturday, using this pathway, Grandmaster Vidit Gujrathi could become the fourth Indian to qualify for the EWC main event.

title: 'The Trump economy is soaring': US Prez cites stock market rally, tax cuts ahead of I-Day
content: US President Donald Trump declared the American economy is "soaring," citing record stock market highs, increased exports, and investment as proof of a new growth era. He attributed these gains to his administration's tax cuts and trade policies, which he claims put more money in Americans' pockets and boosted domestic manufacturing. Trump asserted that the nation is entering a "Golden Age" of prosperity and opportunity.

title: DMK leader R Radhakrishnan arrested over remarks on TN CM Vijay, granted bail
content: Tamil Nadu police arrested senior DMK MLA Anitha R Radhakrishnan for allegedly defaming Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay. The arrest followed the denial of anticipatory bail by the Madras High Court. DMK leaders, including M K Stalin and Udhayanidhi Stalin, condemned the action, labeling it high-handedness and accusing the ruling party of a 'police state' approach. Radhakrishnan asserted his loyalty to the DMK amidst the controversy.

title: How one man's difficult childhood shaped his definition of success
content: A viral Reddit post by a 39-year-old professional earning over Rs 2.2 crore annually highlights how financial independence, rather than wealth itself, transformed his life. Growing up in a troubled household, he viewed education as an escape, eventually studying at BITS Pilani and building a successful global career. Despite his financial success, he says his greatest achievement is providing his children with a peaceful, secure home, proving that independence can create lasting happiness and break generational cycles.

title: Man stabs social media influencer wife to death, then attacks himself
content: A shocking incident unfolded in Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, where a 45-year-old social media influencer and beautician, Nisha Chauhan, was allegedly murdered by her husband, Pradeep. The brutal attack reportedly stemmed from a property dispute. The accused then allegedly attempted suicide and is currently hospitalized. Their teenage child sustained minor injuries intervening in the altercation.

title: 'We knew this would be very tough': Messi admits Cabo Verde pushed Argentina to the limit
content: Defending champions Argentina narrowly escaped a major upset, defeating debutants Cabo Verde 3-2 in extra time to advance to the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16. Lionel Messi opened the scoring, but Cabo Verde fought back twice. An own goal ultimately sealed Argentina's victory, with Messi acknowledging the tough challenge and praising his opponents' spirited performance. The win keeps Argentina on track, with Messi extending his scoring record.

title: FIFA WC Round of 16 confirmed: Full list of qualified teams and fixtures
content: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has reached the Round of 16, with heavyweights Germany and the Netherlands eliminated. Defending champions Argentina national football team survived a scare to qualify alongside 15 other teams. Blockbuster ties include Mexico vs England and Portugal vs Spain as the tournament enters its straight knockout phase.

title: Watch: Passenger's view of Boeing 777 engine on fire while in air goes viral
content: A video of a Boeing 777 engine failure, widely shared as recent, actually dates back to February 2021. United Airlines Flight 328 from Denver to Honolulu experienced a catastrophic engine failure shortly after takeoff, forcing an emergency landing. Miraculously, all 241 people aboard and on the ground were safe, though debris rained down on a Colorado town. Investigations by the FAA and NTSB followed this harrowing incident.

title: 'Forced acid down his throat': Parents kill jobless son over repeated drunken brawls
content: A shocking incident has emerged from Rajkot where a young man was allegedly murdered by his parents. Authorities arrested the couple after a forensic postmortem revealed strangulation marks, contradicting the family's claim of suicide by acid consumption. The victim's wife filed a complaint detailing the alleged brutal act by his mother and father following an argument.

title: Vidit Gujrathi Exclusive: 'India is a chess powerhouse but still far from...'
content: Ahead of the India Rising: Road to EWC Chess LAN Finals in Mumbai on Saturday, Grandmaster Vidit Gujrathi spoke to TimesofIndia.com about his journey through the qualifiers, India's growing stature in world chess, and the evolving relationship between chess and esports. Reflecting on a near-elimination scare, Vidit backed India's dedicated EWC pathway and expressed his determination to secure a place at the Esports World Cup 2026 in Paris.

title: What is next for Kramnik after chess legend handed two-year ban by FIDE?
content: Former world champion Vladimir Kramnik has been banned by FIDE for two years, with the second year suspended, over unethical conduct linked to public cheating allegations against players including David Navara and Daniel Naroditsky. FIDE cited bullying, unjustified accusations and procedural violations. Kramnik has vowed to appeal the ruling.

title: Centre orders blocking of battery management apps used to turn off e-rickshaws
content:
Action comes after e-rickshaws in various parts of the country were turned off via apps developed
by Chinese firms to manage lithium ion battery packs; extortion incident reported in Ujjain

title: Odisha signs memorandum of cooperation for Japan-backed projects worth ₹67,000 crore
content: Adani Enterprises and UAE’s International Holding Company (IHC) Group on July 2 signed an MoU with Odisha to invest ₹1.08 lakh crore in aluminium sector, largest FDI for the State

title: Ajit Kumar Shasany appointed new V-C of Central University of Odisha in Koraput
content: A senior scientist with extensive experience across various CSIR institutions, Dr. Shasany has made notable contributions to botanical research.

title: Allahabad High Court declines to stay ATS probe into funding of over 4,000 madrassas in U.P.
content: Accepting the State’s submissions, the High Court observed that the mere conduct of an inquiry could not be treated as coercive action against the petitioners

title: Delhi HC issues notice to ZEE over FIFA World Cup streaming accessibility for the visually challenged
content: Plea in court argues ZEE5 app and website are inaccessible to persons who are blind or have low vision; highlights judicial precedent that digital access is an integral part of the fundamental right to life

title: Congress hit with new infighting row in M.P. after Digvijaya Singh refutes Jitu Patwari’s claims over Ujjain land ‘scam’
content: Even though Congress leaders now say that the issue has been resolved and the party is now focused on the byelection on Datia Assembly constituency, a source said that the matter has reached the party national leadership and that “there are high chances of an intervention from Delhi”

title: Kannur Corporation to launch online septic tank cleaning booking system
content: The service will be available on demand to all residents within the jurisdiction of the Corporation, including apartments and other residential complexes that require septic tank cleaning, says the Mayor

title: Bihar Guv. Hasnain and MoS Margherita attend Ali Khamenei's funeral ceremony in Tehran
content: Former External Affairs Minister Salman Khurshid is representing the Congress party at the funeral ceremony

title: Puducherry court asks T.N. Minister to appear on July 5 in assault case
content: The victim had challenged the First Information Report for invoking only soft provisions of the law against N. Marie Wilson

title: Meghalaya Warns Of El Nino Risks, Calls Climate Change 'Existential Crisis'
content: The concern comes at a time when Meghalaya has recorded the highest monsoon rainfall deficit among all northeastern states this season.

title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News Updates: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's Funeral Begins In Iran
content: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Preparations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's public funeral are taking place in Tehran, following which his remains will be taken to the Iraqi holy cities of Najaf and Karbala.

title: At Ali Khamenei's Funeral, A Small Coffin, Picture Of His 14-Month-Old Granddaughter
content: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's granddaughter, Zahra Mohammadi Golpayegani, was killed alongside him and some other family members on February 28.

title: Kidnapped Telangana Boy Found After 12 Days, Accused Says He Took Him To Hospital
content: CCTV footage showed a man walking away with the child, leading the Government Railway Police (GRP) to register a kidnapping case and launch a massive search.

title: Jaish, Lashkar Members Among 23 Pak-Based Individuals Designated As Terrorists
content: The Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967 (37 of 1967) empowers the central government to add the name of an individual as designated terrorist if it believes that the individual is involved in terrorism.

title: Mumbai On Red Alert As Weather Agency Warns Of Extremely Heavy Rainfall
content: Civic officials said that while the metropolis recorded over 100 mm of rain in several parts over the last 24 hours, public transport remains operational.

title: Engine Damage To Excess Water Use: Centre Busts 10 Myths On E20 Petrol
content: In a 10-point clarification, the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas said the programme, under which petrol contains up to 20% ethanol, is supported by scientific studies, international experience and regulatory safeguards.

title: 'Fake News': Israel Rejects Report On Plotting To Kill Iranian Negotiators
content: US is Israel's closest ally, but President Donald Trump has been publicly critical of Israeli PM Netanyahu in recent weeks after Israel's war with Hezbollah in Lebanon threatened peace talks with Iran.

title: Over 100 Hindu-Americans Mark US 250th Anniversary, Raise Hinduphobia Concerns
content: Hosted by the Coalition of Hindus of North America (CoHNA), the event brought together lawmakers, community leaders, students, veterans, researchers and interfaith representatives

title: Baloch Rebels Claim They Killed Over 30 Pak Coast Guards In Suicide Bombing
content: The rebel group said the attack took place at approximately 6:32 pm on July 3, when a member of its elite Majeed Brigade allegedly drove an explosive-laden Mazda vehicle into the Coast Guards camp.

title: 'For Tibet': Tibetan Exile's Last Message As He Set Self On Fire Outside UN Office
content: The self-immolation comes at a symbolically charged time for the exile community, with preparations underway for the Dalai Lama's upcoming 91st birthday celebrations.

title: Pakistan Deputy PM Ishaq Dar's Relative Arrested In Gangrape Of Foreign Women
content: The suspects, identified as Muhammad Raza Dar, Hassan Raza, Sikandar Khan and Sajid Ali, were sent to five-day police remand by a Lahore court on Friday.

title: "Usually Read Stories About Myself": Trump On Usha Vance's Podcast
content: When Vance asked Trump if he has much time to read for fun while serving as president, he replied that he ends up mostly reading newspapers.

title: 'I Should Invite Obama, Biden': Trump Floats White House Football Reunion
content: Donald Trump made the suggestion on the podcast hosted by US Second Lady Usha Vance which was released on Friday ahead of the 250th anniversary of American Independence.

title: Thousands Attend Khamenei's Funeral, Iranian Leaders Break Down At Farewell
content: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi broke down in tears during the farewell ceremony for former Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Tehran on Friday.

title: Bengaluru Daycare Horror: Rights Panel Issues Notice To Karnataka Government
content: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) has taken suo motu cognisance of a media report about "some toddlers being treated inhumanely by the nannies at a creche operating on the premises of an IT company in Bengaluru".

title: Delhi Lt Governor Orders Citywide Drone-Led Anti-Encroachment Drive
content: According to officials, the LG asked the DDA to leverage technology for real-time monitoring of land parcels and buildings so that any unauthorized occupation or construction can be detected and acted upon swiftly.

title: "Mind Your...": Iran Hits Back At Trump Over "Hungry Nation" Remarks
content: Iran on Thursday criticised US President Donald Trump over his remarks on Iran's economy and food needs, accusing him of projecting America's own domestic challenges after Trump said the United States hoped to export food commodities to Iran.

title: 5.5 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Chile
content: An earthquake measuring 5.5 magnitude struck near coast of central Chile on Friday, the German Research Centre for Geosciences (GFZ) said.

title: Brazil Court Rules Jair Bolsonaro To Remain Under House Arrest
content: Brazil's Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes has ruled that former Brazilian President Jair Bolsonaro can remain under house arrest due to health concerns, a court decision showed on Friday.

title: Usha Vance faces backlash after inviting Trump to children's podcast

title: Australian officials ask fans to respect privacy of Neil, a 1000kg seal, who respects nothing
content: the 5-year-old mammal is a 1,000 kg elephant seal . it weighs as much as a small car and has a social media following more than double Tasmania's human population . officials say their concern is that Neil's popularity could lead to ill-advised human-seal encounters .
